The '''105th Stormtrooper Platoon''' was a [[Platoon/Legends|platoon]] that served in the [[Stormtrooper Corps/Legends|Stormtrooper Corps]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Stationed aboard [[Starlyte Station]], the platoon supported Imperial liaison officer [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Arissa Fawn]].

[[File:Brezzic_Marr.png|thumb|left|170px|Brezzic Marr, commanding officer of the 105th Stormtrooper Platoon]]

Despite its backwater posting, the 105th was outfitted with the standard [[Imperial Army/Legends#Platoon|Stormtrooper platoon]] complement: a Platoon Commander, Platoon Adjutant / [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]], four [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeants]], and four [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of eight Stormtroopers with one [[Light repeating blaster/Legends|light repeating blaster]] each.

Nicknamed "The Emperor's Irregulars", the unit's members were particularly mediocre [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]], displaying incompetence at almost every opportunity. Only their unswerving loyalty and tight discipline, harshly maintained by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Brezzic Marr]], [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the platoon, prevented the unit from being reassigned to swab duty. In fact, under the appropriate circumstances, the unit was capable of displaying creativity and tenacity.

To encourage the creative individuality of his troops, Marr encouraged [[Armor/Legends|armor]] personalization normally banned. Each Stormtrooper wore the 105th's platoon symbol, the cog of the Empire with a series of lightning bolts arcing across it, on their right shoulder.
